traceReason: fix/ branches require auditable traces for repository-affecting work
taskSummary: Apply the nine hardening fixes identified against main on a new branch ready for PR review.

bundlesSkipped.reason: No UI/content or GOV.UK component behaviour was changed directly.
No OpenAI API or AI safety implementation was changed.
No MCP or agent-tooling contract was changed.
No Airtable API request/response contract was changed directly.

implementationSummary: Legacy Pages Function proxy now uses allowlisted credentialed CORS, strips upstream CORS, adds CSRF confirmation to proxied mutations and returns generic upstream errors.
Advanced Pages Worker proxy diagnostics are hidden unless RESEARCHOPS_PROXY_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED=true.
Production persistent invocation logging is disabled and log sampling is reduced.
Mural OAuth state is signed and token storage is keyed by authenticated ResearchOps user id.
Mural endpoints now receive Worker auth context and anonymous uid fallback is removed from journal sync payload parsing.
Deploy hook route requires deployment.trigger permission and uses constant-time token comparison without returning Cloudflare hook response text.
Diagnostic endpoints are disabled unless RESEARCHOPS_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED=true.
Passwordless preview config uses a separate preview D1 binding, a provisioned KV binding and a tightened allowlist.
Security workflow now runs on relevant PR changes with Node 22 and package engine metadata is aligned.
PR review follow-up tightens an existing route_api_agent_pages_deploy_post row by updating auth_route_permissions after the seed insert.
CI follow-up restores the passwordless preview KV binding to the provisioned namespace after Cloudflare rejected an unprovisioned namespace ID.

validationEvidence.notes: Exited 0 with existing warning-only lint debt.

validationEvidence.summary: Covered proxy CORS/CSRF, diagnostics, deployment permission, Mural OAuth state/token ownership and production/preview configuration contracts.
16 tests passed after PR review and CI follow-up fixes.
npm run format:check, npm run lint, npm run trace:coverage, npm test and npm run validate passed after the Codex comment and preview deployment fixes.

residualRisks: Separate preview Cloudflare D1 resource must exist before deploying the passwordless preview config.
Preview KV storage remains on the provisioned namespace until a separate KV namespace is created and verified in Cloudflare.
Operators should review the first production retention run after deployment.
Mural OAuth state requires RESEARCHOPS_AUTH_SECRET or MURAL_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET.
